```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">symlinks great for</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:900;color:#5654A2;">1–5 skills</span>
 </div>

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.55em;">— signals to graduate —</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;margin-bottom:0.95em;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-top:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="color:#5654A2;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.35em;"><i data-lucide="layers" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Coherent set that belongs together.</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-top:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="color:#5654A2;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.35em;"><i data-lucide="users" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Want to share with a teammate.</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-top:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="color:#5654A2;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.35em;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Bundle skills + MCP + hooks.</div>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F4F2FB,#EEEDF8);border:2px solid #5654A2;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;">
  Same source of truth. <strong style="color:#5654A2;">Plus distribution.</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
